mapper.sql: id, user_id, card_id, plant_id, self_evaluation, prev_stage, after_stage, prev_round, after_round, was_withered, scheduled_date, actual_date, is_deleted, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_review_record WHERE card_id = #{cardId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_review_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND actual_date = #{date} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_review_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND actual_date = #{date} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_review_record (user_id, card_id, plant_id, self_evaluation, prev_stage, after_stage, prev_round, after_round, was_withered, scheduled_date, actual_date, is_deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{cardId}, #{plantId}, #{selfEvaluation}, #{prevStage}, #{afterStage}, #{prevRound}, #{afterRound}, #{wasWithered}, #{scheduledDate}, #{actualDate}, #{isDeleted})
